top_signals.title: Global Funds Snap Indian Stock Selling Streak as Oil Shock Ebbs
top_signals.summary: Foreign investors turned buyers of Indian equities for the first time in two months as easing Middle East tensions and lower oil prices revive appetite for the market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: British Columbia gold miner sues province over “stripped” mining rights
top_signals.summary: MCC Canadian Gold Ventures said the province had previously lobbied the company to rescue a bankrupt, environmentally compromised gold mine on Banks Island.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Deadly H5 Bird Flu Spreads Worldwide With Australia Outbreak
top_signals.summary: Australian chicken producer Inghams has implemented a “complete lock-down” at its Western Australia operations following the detection of the H5N1 avian influenza in the state. With the virus having reached every continent, the outbreak raises risks for the global agricultural sector and the broader ecosystem. University of Tasmania senior lecturer Jane Younger discusses the potential impact on Australia’s food supply and wildlife on “Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Executives talk tech, port drayage and capacity on FreightWaves Today
top_signals.summary:

top_signals.title: China lithium price slides on speculation over CATL mine restart
top_signals.summary: Jianxiawo, owned by EV battery giant CATL, was forced to shut down in August 2025.

top_signals.summary: Global deal value of M&A is on track to reach $4 trillion in 2026, making it the strongest year since 2021
